title: lahaya corymbosa
intro: Lahaya corymbosa, also known as "Dahon ng Kalabasa" in the Philippines, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lahaya corymbosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as cough and cold. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a decoction, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
